title: Blue GUI - DonutSmp GUI
description:
Blue and darker GUI made for Donut SMP.
For everyone who likes a darker GUI and enjoys Donut SMP.
body:
Blue Gui - DonutSmp Gui


Blue GUI is a resource pack that makes all interfaces darker, making them easier on the eyes, and adds a blue border around them.
It was created for the use on Donut SMP, matching its style, but it can also be used as a standalone GUI pack.
For everyone who prefers a darker, blue-themed Resourcepack


Compatibility

Curently for version 1.21.6 - 26.1.1
It will propably not work in older Versions of Minecraft
More features might be added soon

Mod Support

Mods supported
Vanilla✅
......

Feel free to check out my other Resourcepack as well!

Amethyst Allay and Totem
